cases.description: tuple_hash is sha256 of JCS-canonicalized 9-slot object
cases.rule: tuple_hash = sha256(jcs(pick: who, did, this, when, confirmed_by, if_ok, if_doubt, if_not, status))

cases.description: content_hash is sha256 of JCS-canonicalized receipt with id and hashes excluded
hashes object contains only tuple_hash, content_hash, algorithm
envelope_hash MUST NOT appear inside the receipt hashes object
cases.rule: envelope_hash lives only on the Envelope wrapper

cases.description: result field is forbidden in v0 receipts
evidence field is forbidden in v0 receipts
transport field is forbidden in v0 receipts (lives on Envelope)
receipt_version must use dots, not dashes
hash values are bare 64-char lowercase hex, no prefix
AUX fields are included in content_hash but not in tuple_hash
envelope_hash = sha256(jcs({content, transport})), computed by sender
cases.rule: envelope_hash covers the full Envelope wrapper
